001package react4j.processor;
002
003import com.squareup.javapoet.TypeName;
004import java.io.IOException;
005import java.util.ArrayList;
006import java.util.Arrays;
007import java.util.Collection;
008import java.util.Collections;
009import java.util.Comparator;
010import java.util.HashMap;
011import java.util.HashSet;
012import java.util.List;
013import java.util.Map;
014import java.util.Set;
015import java.util.regex.Matcher;
016import java.util.regex.Pattern;
017import java.util.stream.Collectors;
018import javax.annotation.Nonnull;
019import javax.annotation.Nullable;
020import javax.annotation.processing.RoundEnvironment;
021import javax.annotation.processing.SupportedAnnotationTypes;
022import javax.annotation.processing.SupportedOptions;
023import javax.annotation.processing.SupportedSourceVersion;
024import javax.lang.model.SourceVersion;
025import javax.lang.model.element.AnnotationMirror;
026import javax.lang.model.element.AnnotationValue;
027import javax.lang.model.element.Element;
028import javax.lang.model.element.ElementKind;
029import javax.lang.model.element.ExecutableElement;
030import javax.lang.model.element.Modifier;
031import javax.lang.model.element.TypeElement;
032import javax.lang.model.element.TypeParameterElement;
033import javax.lang.model.element.VariableElement;
034import javax.lang.model.type.ArrayType;
035import javax.lang.model.type.DeclaredType;
036import javax.lang.model.type.ExecutableType;
037import javax.lang.model.type.TypeKind;
038import javax.lang.model.type.TypeMirror;
039import javax.lang.model.type.TypeVariable;
040import javax.lang.model.util.Elements;
041import javax.lang.model.util.Types;
042import javax.tools.Diagnostic;
043import org.realityforge.proton.AbstractStandardProcessor;
044import org.realityforge.proton.AnnotationsUtil;
045import org.realityforge.proton.DeferredElementSet;
046import org.realityforge.proton.ElementsUtil;
047import org.realityforge.proton.MemberChecks;
048import org.realityforge.proton.ProcessorException;
049import org.realityforge.proton.StopWatch;
050
051/**
052 * Annotation processor that analyzes React annotated source and generates models from the annotations.
053 */
054@SuppressWarnings( "Duplicates" )
055@SupportedAnnotationTypes( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME )
056@SupportedSourceVersion( SourceVersion.RELEASE_17 )
057@SupportedOptions( { "react4j.defer.unresolved",
058                     "react4j.defer.errors",
059                     "react4j.debug",
060                     "react4j.profile",
061                     "react4j.verbose_out_of_round.errors" } )
062public final class React4jProcessor
063  extends AbstractStandardProcessor
064{
065  private record ObserveOnRenderConfig(boolean enabled, boolean runtimeCheck)
066  {
067  }
068
069  private static final String SENTINEL_NAME = "<default>";
070  private static final Pattern DEFAULT_GETTER_PATTERN = Pattern.compile( "^get([A-Z].*)Default$" );
071  private static final Pattern VALIDATE_INPUT_PATTERN = Pattern.compile( "^validate([A-Z].*)$" );
072  private static final Pattern LAST_INPUT_PATTERN = Pattern.compile( "^last([A-Z].*)$" );
073  private static final Pattern PREV_INPUT_PATTERN = Pattern.compile( "^prev([A-Z].*)$" );
074  private static final Pattern INPUT_PATTERN = Pattern.compile( "^([a-z].*)$" );
075  private static final Pattern GETTER_PATTERN = Pattern.compile( "^get([A-Z].*)$" );
076  private static final Pattern ISSER_PATTERN = Pattern.compile( "^is([A-Z].*)$" );
077  @Nonnull
078  private final DeferredElementSet _deferredTypes = new DeferredElementSet();
079  @Nonnull
080  private final StopWatch _analyzeViewStopWatch = new StopWatch( "Analyze View" );
081
082  @Override
083  protected void collectStopWatches( @Nonnull final Collection<StopWatch> stopWatches )
084  {
085    stopWatches.add( _analyzeViewStopWatch );
086  }
087
088  @Override
089  public boolean process( @Nonnull final Set<? extends TypeElement> annotations, @Nonnull final RoundEnvironment env )
090  {
091    debugAnnotationProcessingRootElements( env );
092    collectRootTypeNames( env );
093    processTypeElements( annotations,
094                         env,
095                         Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
096                         _deferredTypes,
097                         _analyzeViewStopWatch.getName(),
098                         this::process,
099                         _analyzeViewStopWatch );
100    errorIfProcessingOverAndInvalidTypesDetected( env );
101    clearRootTypeNamesIfProcessingOver( env );
102    return true;
103  }
104
105  @Override
106  @Nonnull
107  protected String getIssueTrackerURL()
108  {
109    return "https://github.com/react4j/react4j/issues";
110  }
111
112  @Nonnull
113  @Override
114  protected String getOptionPrefix()
115  {
116    return "react4j";
117  }
118
119  private void process( @Nonnull final TypeElement element )
120    throws IOException, ProcessorException
121  {
122    final ViewDescriptor descriptor = parse( element );
123    final String packageName = descriptor.getPackageName();
124    emitTypeSpec( packageName, ViewGenerator.buildType( processingEnv, descriptor ) );
125    emitTypeSpec( packageName, BuilderGenerator.buildType( processingEnv, descriptor ) );
126    if ( descriptor.needsInjection() )
127    {
128      emitTypeSpec( packageName, FactoryGenerator.buildType( processingEnv, descriptor ) );
129    }
130  }
131
132  /**
133   * Return true if there is any method annotated with @PostConstruct.
134   */
135  private boolean hasPostConstruct( @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods )
136  {
137    return
138      methods.stream().anyMatch( e -> AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( e, Constants.POST_CONSTRUCT_CLASSNAME ) );
139  }
140
141  @Nonnull
142  private ViewDescriptor parse( @Nonnull final TypeElement typeElement )
143  {
144    final String name = deriveViewName( typeElement );
145    final ViewType type = extractViewType( typeElement );
146    final List<ExecutableElement> methods =
147      ElementsUtil.getMethods( typeElement, processingEnv.getElementUtils(), processingEnv.getTypeUtils() );
148
149    final boolean hasPostConstruct = hasPostConstruct( methods );
150    final boolean shouldSetDefaultPriority = shouldSetDefaultPriority( methods );
151
152    MemberChecks.mustNotBeFinal( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME, typeElement );
153    MemberChecks.mustBeAbstract( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME, typeElement );
154    if ( ElementKind.CLASS != typeElement.getKind() )
155    {
156      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.must( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME, "be a class" ),
157                                    typeElement );
158    }
159    else if ( ElementsUtil.isNonStaticNestedClass( typeElement ) )
160    {
161      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME ) +
162                                    " target must not be a non-static nested class",
163                                    typeElement );
164    }
165    final List<ExecutableElement> constructors = ElementsUtil.getConstructors( typeElement );
166    if ( 1 != constructors.size() || !isConstructorValid( constructors.get( 0 ) ) )
167    {
168      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.must( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
169                                                       "have a single, package-access constructor or the default constructor" ),
170                                    typeElement );
171    }
172    final ExecutableElement constructor = constructors.get( 0 );
173
174    final boolean sting = deriveSting( typeElement, constructor );
175    final boolean notSyntheticConstructor =
176      Elements.Origin.EXPLICIT == processingEnv.getElementUtils().getOrigin( constructor );
177
178    final List<? extends VariableElement> parameters = constructor.getParameters();
179    if ( sting )
180    {
181      if ( parameters.isEmpty() )
182      {
183        throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
184                                                            "have specified sting=ENABLED if the constructor has no parameters" ),
185                                      typeElement );
186      }
187    }
188    else
189    {
190      final boolean hasNamedAnnotation =
191        parameters.stream().anyMatch( p -> AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( p, Constants.STING_NAMED_CLASSNAME ) );
192      if ( hasNamedAnnotation )
193      {
194        throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
195                                                            "have specified sting=DISABLED and have a constructor parameter annotated with the " +
196                                                            Constants.STING_NAMED_CLASSNAME + " annotation" ),
197                                      constructor );
198      }
199    }
200
201    final ViewDescriptor descriptor =
202      new ViewDescriptor( name,
203                          typeElement,
204                          constructor,
205                          type,
206                          sting,
207                          notSyntheticConstructor,
208                          hasPostConstruct,
209                          shouldSetDefaultPriority );
210
211    for ( final Element element : descriptor.getElement().getEnclosedElements() )
212    {
213      if ( ElementKind.METHOD == element.getKind() )
214      {
215        final ExecutableElement method = (ExecutableElement) element;
216        if ( method.getModifiers().contains( Modifier.PUBLIC ) &&
217             MemberChecks.doesMethodNotOverrideInterfaceMethod( processingEnv, typeElement, method ) &&
218             ElementsUtil.isWarningNotSuppressed( method,
219                                                  Constants.WARNING_PUBLIC_METHOD,
220                                                  Constants.SUPPRESS_REACT4J_WARNINGS_CLASSNAME ) )
221        {
222          final String message =
223            MemberChecks.shouldNot( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
224                                    "declare a public method. " +
225                                    MemberChecks.suppressedBy( Constants.WARNING_PUBLIC_METHOD,
226                                                               Constants.SUPPRESS_REACT4J_WARNINGS_CLASSNAME ) );
227          processingEnv.getMessager().printMessage( Diagnostic.Kind.WARNING, message, method );
228        }
229        if ( method.getModifiers().contains( Modifier.FINAL ) &&
230             ElementsUtil.isWarningNotSuppressed( method,
231                                                  Constants.WARNING_FINAL_METHOD,
232                                                  Constants.SUPPRESS_REACT4J_WARNINGS_CLASSNAME ) )
233        {
234          final String message =
235            MemberChecks.shouldNot( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
236                                    "declare a final method. " +
237                                    MemberChecks.suppressedBy( Constants.WARNING_FINAL_METHOD,
238                                                               Constants.SUPPRESS_REACT4J_WARNINGS_CLASSNAME ) );
239          processingEnv.getMessager().printMessage( Diagnostic.Kind.WARNING, message, method );
240        }
241        if ( method.getModifiers().contains( Modifier.PROTECTED ) &&
242             ElementsUtil.isWarningNotSuppressed( method,
243                                                  Constants.WARNING_PROTECTED_METHOD,
244                                                  Constants.SUPPRESS_REACT4J_WARNINGS_CLASSNAME ) &&
245             !isMethodAProtectedOverride( typeElement, method ) )
246        {
247          final String message =
248            MemberChecks.shouldNot( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
249                                    "declare a protected method. " +
250                                    MemberChecks.suppressedBy( Constants.WARNING_PROTECTED_METHOD,
251                                                               Constants.SUPPRESS_REACT4J_WARNINGS_CLASSNAME ) );
252          processingEnv.getMessager().printMessage( Diagnostic.Kind.WARNING, message, method );
253        }
254      }
255    }
256
257    determineViewCapabilities( descriptor, typeElement );
258    determineInputs( descriptor, methods );
259    determineInputValidatesMethods( descriptor, methods );
260    determineOnInputChangeMethods( descriptor, methods );
261    determineDefaultInputsMethods( descriptor, methods );
262    determineDefaultInputsFields( descriptor );
263    determinePreUpdateMethod( typeElement, descriptor, methods );
264    determinePostMountOrUpdateMethod( typeElement, descriptor, methods );
265    determinePostUpdateMethod( typeElement, descriptor, methods );
266    determinePostMountMethod( typeElement, descriptor, methods );
267    determineOnErrorMethod( typeElement, descriptor, methods );
268    determineScheduleRenderMethods( typeElement, descriptor, methods );
269    determinePublishMethods( typeElement, descriptor, methods );
270    determinePreRenderMethods( typeElement, descriptor, methods );
271    determinePostRenderMethods( typeElement, descriptor, methods );
272    determineRenderMethod( typeElement, descriptor, methods );
273
274    for ( final InputDescriptor input : descriptor.getInputs() )
275    {
276      if ( !isInputRequired( input ) )
277      {
278        input.markAsOptional();
279      }
280      else
281      {
282        if ( input.isContextSource() )
283        {
284          throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME,
285                                                              "specify require=ENABLE parameter when the for source=CONTEXT parameter is specified" ),
286                                        input.getMethod() );
287        }
288      }
289    }
290
291    /*
292     * Sorting must occur after @InputDefault has been processed to ensure the sorting
293     * correctly sorts optional inputs after required inputs.
294     */
295    descriptor.sortInputs();
296
297    verifyInputsNotAnnotatedWithArezAnnotations( descriptor );
298    verifyInputsNotCollectionOfArezComponents( descriptor );
299
300    return descriptor;
301  }
302
303  private boolean isMethodAProtectedOverride( @Nonnull final TypeElement typeElement,
304                                              @Nonnull final ExecutableElement method )
305  {
306    final ExecutableElement overriddenMethod = ElementsUtil.getOverriddenMethod( processingEnv, typeElement, method );
307    return null != overriddenMethod && overriddenMethod.getModifiers().contains( Modifier.PROTECTED );
308  }
309
310  private boolean deriveSting( @Nonnull final TypeElement typeElement, final @Nonnull ExecutableElement constructor )
311  {
312    final String inject =
313      AnnotationsUtil.getEnumAnnotationParameter( typeElement,
314                                                  Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
315                                                  "sting" );
316    if ( "ENABLE".equals( inject ) )
317    {
318      return true;
319    }
320    else if ( "DISABLE".equals( inject ) )
321    {
322      return false;
323    }
324    else
325    {
326      return !constructor.getParameters().isEmpty() &&
327             null != processingEnv.getElementUtils().getTypeElement( Constants.STING_INJECTABLE_CLASSNAME );
328    }
329  }
330
331  private boolean isConstructorValid( @Nonnull final ExecutableElement ctor )
332  {
333    if ( Elements.Origin.EXPLICIT != processingEnv.getElementUtils().getOrigin( ctor ) )
334    {
335      return true;
336    }
337    else
338    {
339      final Set<Modifier> modifiers = ctor.getModifiers();
340      return
341        !modifiers.contains( Modifier.PRIVATE ) &&
342        !modifiers.contains( Modifier.PUBLIC ) &&
343        !modifiers.contains( Modifier.PROTECTED );
344    }
345  }
346
347  private void verifyInputsNotCollectionOfArezComponents( @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor )
348  {
349    for ( final InputDescriptor input : descriptor.getInputs() )
350    {
351      final ExecutableElement method = input.getMethod();
352      final TypeMirror returnType = method.getReturnType();
353      if ( TypeKind.DECLARED == returnType.getKind() )
354      {
355        final DeclaredType declaredType = (DeclaredType) returnType;
356        final List<? extends TypeMirror> typeArguments = declaredType.getTypeArguments();
357        if ( isCollection( declaredType ) )
358        {
359          if ( 1 == typeArguments.size() && isArezComponent( typeArguments.get( 0 ) ) )
360          {
361            throw new ProcessorException( "@Input target is a collection that contains Arez components. " +
362                                          "This is not a safe pattern when the arez components can be disposed.",
363                                          method );
364          }
365        }
366        else if ( isMap( declaredType ) )
367        {
368          if ( 2 == typeArguments.size() &&
369               ( isArezComponent( typeArguments.get( 0 ) ) ||
370                 isArezComponent( typeArguments.get( 1 ) ) ) )
371          {
372            throw new ProcessorException( "@Input target is a collection that contains Arez components. " +
373                                          "This is not a safe pattern when the arez components can be disposed.",
374                                          method );
375          }
376        }
377      }
378      else if ( TypeKind.ARRAY == returnType.getKind() )
379      {
380        final ArrayType arrayType = (ArrayType) returnType;
381        if ( isArezComponent( arrayType.getComponentType() ) )
382        {
383          throw new ProcessorException( "@Input target is an array that contains Arez components. " +
384                                        "This is not a safe pattern when the arez components can be disposed.",
385                                        method );
386        }
387      }
388    }
389  }
390
391  private boolean isCollection( @Nonnull final DeclaredType declaredType )
392  {
393    final TypeElement returnType = (TypeElement) processingEnv.getTypeUtils().asElement( declaredType );
394    final String classname = returnType.getQualifiedName().toString();
395    /*
396     * For the time being lets just list out a bunch of collections. We can ge more specific when/if
397     * it is ever required
398     */
399    return Collection.class.getName().equals( classname ) ||
400           Set.class.getName().equals( classname ) ||
401           List.class.getName().equals( classname ) ||
402           HashSet.class.getName().equals( classname ) ||
403           ArrayList.class.getName().equals( classname );
404  }
405
406  private boolean isMap( @Nonnull final DeclaredType declaredType )
407  {
408    final TypeElement returnType = (TypeElement) processingEnv.getTypeUtils().asElement( declaredType );
409    final String classname = returnType.getQualifiedName().toString();
410    /*
411     * For the time being lets just list out a bunch of collections. We can ge more specific when/if
412     * it is ever required
413     */
414    return Map.class.getName().equals( classname ) || HashMap.class.getName().equals( classname );
415  }
416
417  private boolean isArezComponent( @Nonnull final TypeMirror typeMirror )
418  {
419    return typeMirror instanceof DeclaredType &&
420           processingEnv.getTypeUtils()
421             .asElement( typeMirror )
422             .getAnnotationMirrors()
423             .stream()
424             .anyMatch( a -> a.getAnnotationType().toString().equals( Constants.AREZ_COMPONENT_CLASSNAME ) );
425  }
426
427  private void verifyInputsNotAnnotatedWithArezAnnotations( @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor )
428  {
429    for ( final InputDescriptor input : descriptor.getInputs() )
430    {
431      final ExecutableElement method = input.getMethod();
432      for ( final AnnotationMirror mirror : method.getAnnotationMirrors() )
433      {
434        final String classname = mirror.getAnnotationType().toString();
435        if ( classname.startsWith( "arez.annotations." ) )
436        {
437          throw new ProcessorException( "@Input target must not be annotated with any arez annotations but " +
438                                        "is annotated by '" + classname + "'.", method );
439        }
440      }
441    }
442  }
443
444  private void determineOnInputChangeMethods( @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
445                                              @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods )
446  {
447    final List<ExecutableElement> onInputChangeMethods =
448      methods
449        .stream()
450        .filter( m -> AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( m, Constants.ON_INPUT_CHANGE_CLASSNAME ) )
451        .toList();
452
453    final ArrayList<OnInputChangeDescriptor> onInputChangeDescriptors = new ArrayList<>();
454    for ( final ExecutableElement method : onInputChangeMethods )
455    {
456      final VariableElement phase = (VariableElement)
457        AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValue( method, Constants.ON_INPUT_CHANGE_CLASSNAME, "phase" ).getValue();
458      final boolean preUpdate = phase.getSimpleName().toString().equals( "PRE" );
459
460      final List<? extends VariableElement> parameters = method.getParameters();
461      final ExecutableType methodType = resolveMethodType( descriptor, method );
462      final List<? extends TypeMirror> parameterTypes = methodType.getParameterTypes();
463
464      MemberChecks.mustBeSubclassCallable( descriptor.getElement(),
465                                           Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
466                                           Constants.ON_INPUT_CHANGE_CLASSNAME,
467                                           method );
468      MemberChecks.mustNotThrowAnyExceptions( Constants.ON_INPUT_CHANGE_CLASSNAME, method );
469      MemberChecks.mustNotReturnAnyValue( Constants.ON_INPUT_CHANGE_CLASSNAME, method );
470
471      final int parameterCount = parameters.size();
472      if ( 0 == parameterCount )
473      {
474        throw new ProcessorException( "@OnInputChange target must have at least 1 parameter.", method );
475      }
476      final List<InputDescriptor> inputDescriptors = new ArrayList<>( parameterCount );
477      for ( int i = 0; i < parameterCount; i++ )
478      {
479        final VariableElement parameter = parameters.get( i );
480        final String name = deriveOnInputChangeName( parameter );
481        final InputDescriptor input = descriptor.findInputNamed( name );
482        if ( null == input )
483        {
484          throw new ProcessorException( "@OnInputChange target has a parameter named '" +
485                                        parameter.getSimpleName() + "' and the parameter is associated with a " +
486                                        "@Input named '" + name + "' but there is no corresponding @Input " +
487                                        "annotated method.", parameter );
488        }
489        final Types typeUtils = processingEnv.getTypeUtils();
490        if ( !typeUtils.isAssignable( parameterTypes.get( i ), input.getMethodType().getReturnType() ) )
491        {
492          throw new ProcessorException( "@OnInputChange target has a parameter named '" +
493                                        parameter.getSimpleName() + "' and the parameter type is not " +
494                                        "assignable to the return type of the associated @Input annotated method.",
495                                        method );
496        }
497        final boolean mismatchedNullability =
498          (
499            AnnotationsUtil.hasNonnullAnnotation( parameter ) &&
500            AnnotationsUtil.hasNullableAnnotation( input.getMethod() )
501          ) ||
502          (
503            AnnotationsUtil.hasNullableAnnotation( parameter ) &&
504            input.isNonNull() );
505
506        if ( mismatchedNullability )
507        {
508          throw new ProcessorException( "@OnInputChange target has a parameter named '" +
509                                        parameter.getSimpleName() + "' that has a nullability annotation " +
510                                        "incompatible with the associated @Input method named " +
511                                        method.getSimpleName(), method );
512        }
513        if ( input.isImmutable() )
514        {
515          throw new ProcessorException( "@OnInputChange target has a parameter named '" +
516                                        parameter.getSimpleName() + "' that is associated with a @Input " +
517                                        "annotated method and the input is specified as immutable.", method );
518        }
519        inputDescriptors.add( input );
520      }
521      onInputChangeDescriptors.add( new OnInputChangeDescriptor( method, inputDescriptors, preUpdate ) );
522    }
523    descriptor.setOnInputChangeDescriptors( onInputChangeDescriptors );
524  }
525
526  @Nonnull
527  private String deriveOnInputChangeName( @Nonnull final VariableElement parameter )
528  {
529    final AnnotationValue value =
530      AnnotationsUtil.findAnnotationValue( parameter, Constants.INPUT_REF_CLASSNAME, "value" );
531
532    if ( null != value )
533    {
534      return (String) value.getValue();
535    }
536    else
537    {
538      final String parameterName = parameter.getSimpleName().toString();
539      if ( LAST_INPUT_PATTERN.matcher( parameterName ).matches() ||
540           PREV_INPUT_PATTERN.matcher( parameterName ).matches() )
541      {
542        return Character.toLowerCase( parameterName.charAt( 4 ) ) + parameterName.substring( 5 );
543      }
544      else if ( INPUT_PATTERN.matcher( parameterName ).matches() )
545      {
546        return parameterName;
547      }
548      else
549      {
550        throw new ProcessorException( "@OnInputChange target has a parameter named '" + parameterName +
551                                      "' is not explicitly associated with a input using @InputRef nor does it " +
552                                      "follow required naming conventions 'prev[MyInput]', 'last[MyInput]' or " +
553                                      "'[myInput]'.", parameter );
554      }
555    }
556  }
557
558  private void determineInputValidatesMethods( @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
559                                               @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods )
560  {
561    final List<ExecutableElement> inputValidateMethods =
562      methods
563        .stream()
564        .filter( m -> AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( m, Constants.INPUT_VALIDATE_CLASSNAME ) )
565        .toList();
566
567    for ( final ExecutableElement method : inputValidateMethods )
568    {
569      final String name = deriveInputValidateName( method );
570      final InputDescriptor input = descriptor.findInputNamed( name );
571      if ( null == input )
572      {
573        throw new ProcessorException( "@InputValidate target for input named '" + name + "' has no corresponding " +
574                                      "@Input annotated method.", method );
575      }
576      if ( 1 != method.getParameters().size() )
577      {
578        throw new ProcessorException( "@InputValidate target must have exactly 1 parameter", method );
579      }
580      final ExecutableType methodType = resolveMethodType( descriptor, method );
581      if ( !processingEnv.getTypeUtils().isAssignable( methodType.getParameterTypes().get( 0 ),
582                                                       input.getMethodType().getReturnType() ) )
583      {
584        throw new ProcessorException( "@InputValidate target has a parameter type that is not assignable to the " +
585                                      "return type of the associated @Input annotated method.", method );
586      }
587      MemberChecks.mustBeSubclassCallable( descriptor.getElement(),
588                                           Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
589                                           Constants.INPUT_VALIDATE_CLASSNAME,
590                                           method );
591      MemberChecks.mustNotThrowAnyExceptions( Constants.INPUT_VALIDATE_CLASSNAME, method );
592      MemberChecks.mustNotReturnAnyValue( Constants.INPUT_VALIDATE_CLASSNAME, method );
593
594      final VariableElement param = method.getParameters().get( 0 );
595      final boolean mismatchedNullability =
596        (
597          AnnotationsUtil.hasNonnullAnnotation( param ) &&
598          AnnotationsUtil.hasNullableAnnotation( input.getMethod() )
599        ) ||
600        (
601          AnnotationsUtil.hasNullableAnnotation( param ) &&
602          input.isNonNull() );
603
604      if ( mismatchedNullability )
605      {
606        throw new ProcessorException( "@InputValidate target has a parameter that has a nullability annotation " +
607                                      "incompatible with the associated @Input method named " +
608                                      input.getMethod().getSimpleName(), method );
609      }
610      input.setValidateMethod( method );
611    }
612  }
613
614  @Nonnull
615  private String deriveInputValidateName( @Nonnull final Element element )
616    throws ProcessorException
617  {
618    final String name =
619      (String) AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValue( element, Constants.INPUT_VALIDATE_CLASSNAME, "name" )
620        .getValue();
621
622    if ( isSentinelName( name ) )
623    {
624      final String deriveName = deriveName( element, VALIDATE_INPUT_PATTERN, name );
625      if ( null == deriveName )
626      {
627        throw new ProcessorException( "@InputValidate target has not specified name nor is it named according " +
628                                      "to the convention 'validate[Name]Input'.", element );
629      }
630      return deriveName;
631    }
632    else
633    {
634      if ( !SourceVersion.isIdentifier( name ) )
635      {
636        throw new ProcessorException( "@InputValidate target specified an invalid name '" + name + "'. The " +
637                                      "name must be a valid java identifier.", element );
638      }
639      else if ( SourceVersion.isKeyword( name ) )
640      {
641        throw new ProcessorException( "@InputValidate target specified an invalid name '" + name + "'. The " +
642                                      "name must not be a java keyword.", element );
643      }
644      return name;
645    }
646  }
647
648  private void determineDefaultInputsMethods( @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
649                                              @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods )
650  {
651    final List<ExecutableElement> defaultInputsMethods =
652      methods
653        .stream()
654        .filter( m -> AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( m, Constants.INPUT_DEFAULT_CLASSNAME ) )
655        .toList();
656
657    for ( final ExecutableElement method : defaultInputsMethods )
658    {
659      final String name = deriveInputDefaultName( method );
660      final InputDescriptor input = descriptor.findInputNamed( name );
661      if ( null == input )
662      {
663        throw new ProcessorException( "@InputDefault target for input named '" + name + "' has no corresponding " +
664                                      "@Input annotated method.", method );
665      }
666      final ExecutableType methodType = resolveMethodType( descriptor, method );
667      if ( !processingEnv.getTypeUtils().isAssignable( methodType.getReturnType(),
668                                                       input.getMethodType().getReturnType() ) )
669      {
670        throw new ProcessorException( "@InputDefault target has a return type that is not assignable to the " +
671                                      "return type of the associated @Input annotated method.", method );
672      }
673      MemberChecks.mustBeStaticallySubclassCallable( descriptor.getElement(),
674                                                     Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
675                                                     Constants.INPUT_DEFAULT_CLASSNAME,
676                                                     method );
677      MemberChecks.mustNotHaveAnyParameters( Constants.INPUT_DEFAULT_CLASSNAME, method );
678      MemberChecks.mustNotThrowAnyExceptions( Constants.INPUT_DEFAULT_CLASSNAME, method );
679      MemberChecks.mustReturnAValue( Constants.INPUT_DEFAULT_CLASSNAME, method );
680
681      input.setDefaultMethod( method );
682    }
683  }
684
685  private void determineDefaultInputsFields( @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor )
686  {
687    final List<VariableElement> defaultInputsFields =
688      ElementsUtil.getFields( descriptor.getElement() ).stream()
689        .filter( m -> AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( m, Constants.INPUT_DEFAULT_CLASSNAME ) )
690        .toList();
691
692    for ( final VariableElement field : defaultInputsFields )
693    {
694      final String name = deriveInputDefaultName( field );
695      final InputDescriptor input = descriptor.findInputNamed( name );
696      if ( null == input )
697      {
698        throw new ProcessorException( "@InputDefault target for input named '" + name + "' has no corresponding " +
699                                      "@Input annotated method.", field );
700      }
701      if ( !processingEnv.getTypeUtils().isAssignable( field.asType(), input.getMethodType().getReturnType() ) )
702      {
703        throw new ProcessorException( "@InputDefault target has a type that is not assignable to the " +
704                                      "return type of the associated @Input annotated method.", field );
705      }
706      MemberChecks.mustBeStaticallySubclassCallable( descriptor.getElement(),
707                                                     Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
708                                                     Constants.INPUT_DEFAULT_CLASSNAME,
709                                                     field );
710      MemberChecks.mustBeFinal( Constants.INPUT_DEFAULT_CLASSNAME, field );
711      input.setDefaultField( field );
712    }
713  }
714
715  @Nonnull
716  private String deriveInputDefaultName( @Nonnull final Element element )
717    throws ProcessorException
718  {
719    final String name =
720      (String) AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValue( element, Constants.INPUT_DEFAULT_CLASSNAME, "name" )
721        .getValue();
722
723    if ( isSentinelName( name ) )
724    {
725      if ( element instanceof ExecutableElement )
726      {
727        final String deriveName = deriveName( element, DEFAULT_GETTER_PATTERN, name );
728        if ( null == deriveName )
729        {
730          throw new ProcessorException( "@InputDefault target has not specified name nor is it named according " +
731                                        "to the convention 'get[Name]Default'.", element );
732        }
733        return deriveName;
734      }
735      else
736      {
737        final String fieldName = element.getSimpleName().toString();
738        boolean matched = true;
739        final int lengthPrefix = "DEFAULT_".length();
740        final int length = fieldName.length();
741        if ( fieldName.startsWith( "DEFAULT_" ) && length > lengthPrefix )
742        {
743          for ( int i = lengthPrefix; i < length; i++ )
744          {
745            final char ch = fieldName.charAt( i );
746            if ( Character.isLowerCase( ch ) ||
747                 (
748                   ( i != lengthPrefix || !Character.isJavaIdentifierStart( ch ) ) &&
749                   ( i == lengthPrefix || !Character.isJavaIdentifierPart( ch ) )
750                 ) )
751            {
752              matched = false;
753              break;
754            }
755          }
756        }
757        else
758        {
759          matched = false;
760        }
761        if ( matched )
762        {
763          return uppercaseConstantToPascalCase( fieldName.substring( lengthPrefix ) );
764        }
765        else
766        {
767          throw new ProcessorException( "@InputDefault target has not specified name nor is it named according " +
768                                        "to the convention 'DEFAULT_[NAME]'.", element );
769        }
770      }
771    }
772    else
773    {
774      if ( !SourceVersion.isIdentifier( name ) )
775      {
776        throw new ProcessorException( "@InputDefault target specified an invalid name '" + name + "'. The " +
777                                      "name must be a valid java identifier.", element );
778      }
779      else if ( SourceVersion.isKeyword( name ) )
780      {
781        throw new ProcessorException( "@InputDefault target specified an invalid name '" + name + "'. The " +
782                                      "name must not be a java keyword.", element );
783      }
784      return name;
785    }
786  }
787
788  @Nonnull
789  private String uppercaseConstantToPascalCase( @Nonnull final String candidate )
790  {
791    final String s = candidate.toLowerCase();
792    final StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder();
793    boolean uppercase = false;
794    for ( int i = 0; i < s.length(); i++ )
795    {
796      final char ch = s.charAt( i );
797      if ( '_' == ch )
798      {
799        uppercase = true;
800      }
801      else if ( uppercase )
802      {
803        sb.append( Character.toUpperCase( ch ) );
804        uppercase = false;
805      }
806      else
807      {
808        sb.append( ch );
809      }
810    }
811    return sb.toString();
812  }
813
814  private void determineInputs( @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
815                                @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods )
816  {
817    final List<InputDescriptor> inputs =
818      methods
819        .stream()
820        .filter( m -> AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( m, Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME ) )
821        .map( m -> createInputDescriptor( descriptor, methods, m ) )
822        .collect( Collectors.toList() );
823
824    final InputDescriptor childrenInput =
825      inputs.stream().filter( p -> p.getName().equals( "children" ) ).findAny().orElse( null );
826    final InputDescriptor childInput =
827      inputs.stream().filter( p -> p.getName().equals( "child" ) ).findAny().orElse( null );
828    if ( null != childrenInput && null != childInput )
829    {
830      throw new ProcessorException( "Multiple candidate children @Input annotated methods: " +
831                                    childrenInput.getMethod().getSimpleName() + " and " +
832                                    childInput.getMethod().getSimpleName(),
833                                    childrenInput.getMethod() );
834    }
835
836    descriptor.setInputs( inputs );
837  }
838
839  private boolean isInputRequired( @Nonnull final InputDescriptor input )
840  {
841    final String requiredValue = input.getRequiredValue();
842    if ( "ENABLE".equals( requiredValue ) )
843    {
844      return true;
845    }
846    else if ( "DISABLE".equals( requiredValue ) )
847    {
848      return false;
849    }
850    else if ( input.isContextSource() )
851    {
852      return false;
853    }
854    else
855    {
856      return !input.hasDefaultMethod() &&
857             !input.hasDefaultField() &&
858             !AnnotationsUtil.hasNullableAnnotation( input.getMethod() );
859    }
860  }
861
862  @Nonnull
863  private InputDescriptor createInputDescriptor( @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
864                                                 @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods,
865                                                 @Nonnull final ExecutableElement method )
866  {
867    final String name = deriveInputName( method );
868    final ExecutableType methodType = resolveMethodType( descriptor, method );
869
870    verifyNoDuplicateAnnotations( method );
871    MemberChecks.mustBeAbstract( Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME, method );
872    MemberChecks.mustNotHaveAnyParameters( Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME, method );
873    MemberChecks.mustReturnAValue( Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME, method );
874    MemberChecks.mustNotThrowAnyExceptions( Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME, method );
875    MemberChecks.mustNotBePackageAccessInDifferentPackage( descriptor.getElement(),
876                                                           Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
877                                                           Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME,
878                                                           method );
879    final TypeMirror returnType = method.getReturnType();
880    if ( !returnType.getKind().isPrimitive() &&
881         !AnnotationsUtil.hasNonnullAnnotation( method ) &&
882         !AnnotationsUtil.hasNullableAnnotation( method ) &&
883         ElementsUtil.isWarningNotSuppressed( method,
884                                              Constants.WARNING_MISSING_INPUT_NULLABILITY,
885                                              Constants.SUPPRESS_REACT4J_WARNINGS_CLASSNAME ) )
886    {
887      final String message =
888        MemberChecks.shouldNot( Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME,
889                                "return a non-primitive type without a @Nonnull or @Nullable annotation. " +
890                                MemberChecks.suppressedBy( Constants.WARNING_MISSING_INPUT_NULLABILITY,
891                                                           Constants.SUPPRESS_REACT4J_WARNINGS_CLASSNAME ) );
892      processingEnv.getMessager().printMessage( Diagnostic.Kind.WARNING, message, method );
893    }
894    if ( "build".equals( name ) )
895    {
896      throw new ProcessorException( "@Input named 'build' is invalid as it conflicts with the method named " +
897                                    "build() that is used in the generated Builder classes",
898                                    method );
899    }
900    else if ( "child".equals( name ) &&
901              ( returnType.getKind() != TypeKind.DECLARED && !"react4j.ReactNode".equals( returnType.toString() ) ) )
902    {
903      throw new ProcessorException( "@Input named 'child' should be of type react4j.ReactNode", method );
904    }
905    else if ( "children".equals( name ) &&
906              ( returnType.getKind() != TypeKind.DECLARED && !"react4j.ReactNode[]".equals( returnType.toString() ) ) )
907    {
908      throw new ProcessorException( "@Input named 'children' should be of type react4j.ReactNode[]", method );
909    }
910
911    if ( returnType instanceof final TypeVariable typeVariable )
912    {
913      final String typeVariableName = typeVariable.asElement().getSimpleName().toString();
914      List<? extends TypeParameterElement> typeParameters = method.getTypeParameters();
915      if ( typeParameters.stream().anyMatch( p -> p.getSimpleName().toString().equals( typeVariableName ) ) )
916      {
917        throw new ProcessorException( "@Input named '" + name + "' is has a type variable as a return type " +
918                                      "that is declared on the method.", method );
919      }
920    }
921    final String qualifier = (String) AnnotationsUtil
922      .getAnnotationValue( method, Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME, "qualifier" ).getValue();
923    final boolean contextInput = isContextInput( method );
924    final Element inputType = processingEnv.getTypeUtils().asElement( returnType );
925    final boolean immutable = isInputImmutable( method );
926    final boolean observable = isInputObservable( methods, method, immutable );
927    final boolean disposable = null != inputType && isInputDisposable( method, inputType );
928    final ObserveOnRenderConfig observeOnRender = resolveObserveOnRender( method, returnType, inputType );
929    final TypeName typeName = TypeName.get( returnType );
930    if ( typeName.isBoxedPrimitive() && AnnotationsUtil.hasNonnullAnnotation( method ) )
931    {
932      throw new ProcessorException( "@Input named '" + name + "' is a boxed primitive annotated with a " +
933                                    "@Nonnull annotation. The return type should be the primitive type.",
934                                    method );
935    }
936    final ImmutableInputKeyStrategy strategy = immutable ? getImmutableInputKeyStrategy( typeName, inputType ) : null;
937    if ( !"".equals( qualifier ) && !contextInput )
938    {
939      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME,
940                                                          "specify qualifier parameter unless source=CONTEXT is also specified" ),
941                                    method );
942    }
943    final String requiredValue =
944      ( (VariableElement) AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValue( method, Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME, "require" )
945        .getValue() )
946        .getSimpleName().toString();
947
948    final boolean dependency = isInputDependency( method, immutable, disposable );
949
950    final InputDescriptor inputDescriptor =
951      new InputDescriptor( descriptor,
952                           name,
953                           qualifier,
954                           method,
955                           methodType,
956                           inputType,
957                           contextInput,
958                           !immutable,
959                           observable,
960                           disposable,
961                           dependency,
962                           observeOnRender.enabled(),
963                           observeOnRender.runtimeCheck(),
964                           strategy,
965                           requiredValue );
966    if ( inputDescriptor.mayNeedMutableInputAccessedInPostConstructInvariant() )
967    {
968      if ( ElementsUtil.isWarningSuppressed( method,
969                                             Constants.WARNING_MUTABLE_INPUT_ACCESSED_IN_POST_CONSTRUCT,
970                                             Constants.SUPPRESS_REACT4J_WARNINGS_CLASSNAME ) )
971      {
972        inputDescriptor.suppressMutableInputAccessedInPostConstruct();
973      }
974    }
975    return inputDescriptor;
976  }
977
978  @Nonnull
979  private ImmutableInputKeyStrategy getImmutableInputKeyStrategy( @Nonnull final TypeName typeName,
980                                                                  @Nullable final Element element )
981  {
982    if ( typeName.toString().equals( "java.lang.String" ) )
983    {
984      return ImmutableInputKeyStrategy.IS_STRING;
985    }
986    else if ( typeName.isBoxedPrimitive() || typeName.isPrimitive() )
987    {
988      return ImmutableInputKeyStrategy.TO_STRING;
989    }
990    else if ( null != element )
991    {
992      if ( ( ElementKind.CLASS == element.getKind() || ElementKind.INTERFACE == element.getKind() ) &&
993           isAssignableToKeyed( element ) )
994      {
995        return ImmutableInputKeyStrategy.KEYED;
996      }
997      else if ( ( ElementKind.CLASS == element.getKind() || ElementKind.INTERFACE == element.getKind() ) &&
998                (
999                  isAssignableToIdentifiable( element ) ||
1000                  AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( element, Constants.ACT_AS_COMPONENT_CLASSNAME ) ||
1001                  ( AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( element, Constants.AREZ_COMPONENT_CLASSNAME ) &&
1002                    isIdRequired( (TypeElement) element ) )
1003                ) )
1004      {
1005        return ImmutableInputKeyStrategy.AREZ_IDENTIFIABLE;
1006      }
1007      else if ( ElementKind.ENUM == element.getKind() )
1008      {
1009        return ImmutableInputKeyStrategy.ENUM;
1010      }
1011    }
1012    return ImmutableInputKeyStrategy.DYNAMIC;
1013  }
1014
1015  private boolean isAssignableToKeyed( @Nonnull final Element element )
1016  {
1017    final TypeElement typeElement = processingEnv.getElementUtils().getTypeElement( Constants.KEYED_CLASSNAME );
1018    return processingEnv.getTypeUtils().isAssignable( element.asType(), typeElement.asType() );
1019  }
1020
1021  private boolean isAssignableToIdentifiable( @Nonnull final Element element )
1022  {
1023    final TypeElement typeElement = processingEnv.getElementUtils().getTypeElement( Constants.IDENTIFIABLE_CLASSNAME );
1024    final TypeMirror identifiableErasure = processingEnv.getTypeUtils().erasure( typeElement.asType() );
1025    return processingEnv.getTypeUtils().isAssignable( element.asType(), identifiableErasure );
1026  }
1027
1028  /**
1029   * The logic from this method has been cloned from Arez.
1030   * One day we should consider improving Arez so that this is not required somehow?
1031   */
1032  private boolean isIdRequired( @Nonnull final TypeElement element )
1033  {
1034    final VariableElement requireIdParameter = (VariableElement)
1035      AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValue( element, Constants.AREZ_COMPONENT_CLASSNAME, "requireId" )
1036        .getValue();
1037    return !"DISABLE".equals( requireIdParameter.getSimpleName().toString() );
1038  }
1039
1040  @Nonnull
1041  private String deriveInputName( @Nonnull final ExecutableElement method )
1042    throws ProcessorException
1043  {
1044    final String specifiedName =
1045      (String) AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValue( method, Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME, "name" ).getValue();
1046
1047    final String name = getPropertyAccessorName( method, specifiedName );
1048    if ( !SourceVersion.isIdentifier( name ) )
1049    {
1050      throw new ProcessorException( "@Input target specified an invalid name '" + specifiedName + "'. The " +
1051                                    "name must be a valid java identifier.", method );
1052    }
1053    else if ( SourceVersion.isKeyword( name ) )
1054    {
1055      throw new ProcessorException( "@Input target specified an invalid name '" + specifiedName + "'. The " +
1056                                    "name must not be a java keyword.", method );
1057    }
1058    else
1059    {
1060      return name;
1061    }
1062  }
1063
1064  private void determineOnErrorMethod( @Nonnull final TypeElement typeElement,
1065                                       @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
1066                                       @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods )
1067  {
1068    for ( final ExecutableElement method : methods )
1069    {
1070      if ( AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( method, Constants.ON_ERROR_CLASSNAME ) )
1071      {
1072        MemberChecks.mustNotBeAbstract( Constants.ON_ERROR_CLASSNAME, method );
1073        MemberChecks.mustBeSubclassCallable( typeElement,
1074                                             Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
1075                                             Constants.ON_ERROR_CLASSNAME,
1076                                             method );
1077        MemberChecks.mustNotReturnAnyValue( Constants.ON_ERROR_CLASSNAME, method );
1078        MemberChecks.mustNotThrowAnyExceptions( Constants.ON_ERROR_CLASSNAME, method );
1079
1080        boolean infoFound = false;
1081        boolean errorFound = false;
1082        for ( final VariableElement parameter : method.getParameters() )
1083        {
1084          final TypeName typeName = TypeName.get( parameter.asType() );
1085          if ( typeName.toString().equals( Constants.ERROR_INFO_CLASSNAME ) )
1086          {
1087            if ( infoFound )
1088            {
1089              throw new ProcessorException( "@OnError target has multiple parameters of type " +
1090                                            Constants.ERROR_INFO_CLASSNAME,
1091                                            method );
1092            }
1093            infoFound = true;
1094          }
1095          else if ( typeName.toString().equals( Constants.JS_ERROR_CLASSNAME ) )
1096          {
1097            if ( errorFound )
1098            {
1099              throw new ProcessorException( "@OnError target has multiple parameters of type " +
1100                                            Constants.JS_ERROR_CLASSNAME,
1101                                            method );
1102            }
1103            errorFound = true;
1104          }
1105          else
1106          {
1107            throw new ProcessorException( "@OnError target has parameter of invalid type named " +
1108                                          parameter.getSimpleName(),
1109                                          parameter );
1110          }
1111        }
1112        descriptor.setOnError( method );
1113      }
1114    }
1115  }
1116
1117  private void determineScheduleRenderMethods( @Nonnull final TypeElement typeElement,
1118                                               @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
1119                                               @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods )
1120  {
1121    final List<ScheduleRenderDescriptor> scheduleRenderDescriptors = new ArrayList<>();
1122    for ( final ExecutableElement method : methods )
1123    {
1124      final AnnotationMirror annotation =
1125        AnnotationsUtil.findAnnotationByType( method, Constants.SCHEDULE_RENDER_CLASSNAME );
1126      if ( null != annotation )
1127      {
1128        MemberChecks.mustBeAbstract( Constants.SCHEDULE_RENDER_CLASSNAME, method );
1129        MemberChecks.mustBeSubclassCallable( typeElement,
1130                                             Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
1131                                             Constants.SCHEDULE_RENDER_CLASSNAME,
1132                                             method );
1133        MemberChecks.mustNotReturnAnyValue( Constants.SCHEDULE_RENDER_CLASSNAME, method );
1134        MemberChecks.mustNotThrowAnyExceptions( Constants.SCHEDULE_RENDER_CLASSNAME, method );
1135
1136        final ViewType viewType = descriptor.getType();
1137        if ( ViewType.STATEFUL != viewType )
1138        {
1139          final String message =
1140            MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.SCHEDULE_RENDER_CLASSNAME,
1141                                  "be enclosed in a type if it is annotated by @View(type=" + viewType +
1142                                  "). The type must be STATEFUL" );
1143          throw new ProcessorException( message, method );
1144        }
1145
1146        final boolean skipShouldViewUpdate =
1147          AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValueValue( annotation, "skipShouldViewUpdate" );
1148
1149        scheduleRenderDescriptors.add( new ScheduleRenderDescriptor( method, skipShouldViewUpdate ) );
1150      }
1151    }
1152    descriptor.setScheduleRenderDescriptors( scheduleRenderDescriptors );
1153  }
1154
1155  private void determinePublishMethods( @Nonnull final TypeElement typeElement,
1156                                        @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
1157                                        @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods )
1158  {
1159    final List<PublishDescriptor> descriptors = new ArrayList<>();
1160    for ( final ExecutableElement method : methods )
1161    {
1162      final AnnotationMirror annotation = AnnotationsUtil.findAnnotationByType( method, Constants.PUBLISH_CLASSNAME );
1163      if ( null != annotation )
1164      {
1165        MemberChecks.mustBeSubclassCallable( typeElement,
1166                                             Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
1167                                             Constants.PUBLISH_CLASSNAME,
1168                                             method );
1169        MemberChecks.mustNotHaveAnyParameters( Constants.PUBLISH_CLASSNAME, method );
1170        MemberChecks.mustNotHaveAnyTypeParameters( Constants.PUBLISH_CLASSNAME, method );
1171        MemberChecks.mustReturnAValue( Constants.PUBLISH_CLASSNAME, method );
1172        MemberChecks.mustNotThrowAnyExceptions( Constants.PUBLISH_CLASSNAME, method );
1173
1174        final String qualifier = AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValueValue( annotation, "qualifier" );
1175        final ExecutableType methodType = resolveMethodType( descriptor, method );
1176
1177        if ( TypeKind.TYPEVAR == methodType.getReturnType().getKind() )
1178        {
1179          throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.PUBLISH_CLASSNAME, "return a type variable" ),
1180                                        method );
1181        }
1182
1183        descriptors.add( new PublishDescriptor( qualifier, method, methodType ) );
1184      }
1185    }
1186    descriptor.setPublishDescriptors( descriptors );
1187  }
1188
1189  private void determinePreRenderMethods( @Nonnull final TypeElement typeElement,
1190                                          @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
1191                                          @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods )
1192  {
1193    final List<RenderHookDescriptor> descriptors = new ArrayList<>();
1194    for ( final ExecutableElement method : methods )
1195    {
1196      final AnnotationMirror annotation =
1197        AnnotationsUtil.findAnnotationByType( method, Constants.PRE_RENDER_CLASSNAME );
1198      if ( null != annotation )
1199      {
1200        MemberChecks.mustBeSubclassCallable( typeElement,
1201                                             Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
1202                                             Constants.PRE_RENDER_CLASSNAME,
1203                                             method );
1204        MemberChecks.mustNotBeAbstract( Constants.PRE_RENDER_CLASSNAME, method );
1205        MemberChecks.mustNotHaveAnyParameters( Constants.PRE_RENDER_CLASSNAME, method );
1206        MemberChecks.mustNotHaveAnyTypeParameters( Constants.PRE_RENDER_CLASSNAME, method );
1207        MemberChecks.mustNotReturnAnyValue( Constants.PRE_RENDER_CLASSNAME, method );
1208        MemberChecks.mustNotThrowAnyExceptions( Constants.PRE_RENDER_CLASSNAME, method );
1209
1210        final int sortOrder = AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValueValue( annotation, "sortOrder" );
1211        final ExecutableType methodType = resolveMethodType( descriptor, method );
1212
1213        descriptors.add( new RenderHookDescriptor( sortOrder, method, methodType ) );
1214      }
1215    }
1216    descriptors.sort( Comparator.comparingInt( RenderHookDescriptor::getSortOrder ) );
1217    descriptor.setPreRenderDescriptors( descriptors );
1218  }
1219
1220  private void determinePostRenderMethods( @Nonnull final TypeElement typeElement,
1221                                           @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
1222                                           @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods )
1223  {
1224    final List<RenderHookDescriptor> descriptors = new ArrayList<>();
1225    for ( final ExecutableElement method : methods )
1226    {
1227      final AnnotationMirror annotation =
1228        AnnotationsUtil.findAnnotationByType( method, Constants.POST_RENDER_CLASSNAME );
1229      if ( null != annotation )
1230      {
1231        MemberChecks.mustBeSubclassCallable( typeElement,
1232                                             Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
1233                                             Constants.POST_RENDER_CLASSNAME,
1234                                             method );
1235        MemberChecks.mustNotBeAbstract( Constants.POST_RENDER_CLASSNAME, method );
1236        MemberChecks.mustNotHaveAnyParameters( Constants.POST_RENDER_CLASSNAME, method );
1237        MemberChecks.mustNotHaveAnyTypeParameters( Constants.POST_RENDER_CLASSNAME, method );
1238        MemberChecks.mustNotReturnAnyValue( Constants.POST_RENDER_CLASSNAME, method );
1239        MemberChecks.mustNotThrowAnyExceptions( Constants.POST_RENDER_CLASSNAME, method );
1240
1241        final int sortOrder = AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValueValue( annotation, "sortOrder" );
1242        final ExecutableType methodType = resolveMethodType( descriptor, method );
1243
1244        descriptors.add( new RenderHookDescriptor( sortOrder, method, methodType ) );
1245      }
1246    }
1247    descriptors.sort( Comparator.comparingInt( RenderHookDescriptor::getSortOrder ) );
1248    descriptor.setPostRenderDescriptors( descriptors );
1249  }
1250
1251  private void determineRenderMethod( @Nonnull final TypeElement typeElement,
1252                                      @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
1253                                      @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods )
1254  {
1255    boolean foundRender = false;
1256    for ( final ExecutableElement method : methods )
1257    {
1258      final AnnotationMirror annotation =
1259        AnnotationsUtil.findAnnotationByType( method, Constants.RENDER_CLASSNAME );
1260      if ( null != annotation )
1261      {
1262        MemberChecks.mustNotBeAbstract( Constants.RENDER_CLASSNAME, method );
1263        MemberChecks.mustBeSubclassCallable( typeElement,
1264                                             Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
1265                                             Constants.RENDER_CLASSNAME,
1266                                             method );
1267        MemberChecks.mustNotHaveAnyParameters( Constants.RENDER_CLASSNAME, method );
1268        MemberChecks.mustReturnAnInstanceOf( processingEnv,
1269                                             method,
1270                                             Constants.RENDER_CLASSNAME,
1271                                             Constants.VNODE_CLASSNAME );
1272        MemberChecks.mustNotThrowAnyExceptions( Constants.RENDER_CLASSNAME, method );
1273        MemberChecks.mustNotHaveAnyTypeParameters( Constants.RENDER_CLASSNAME, method );
1274        if ( !method.getReturnType().getKind().isPrimitive() &&
1275             !AnnotationsUtil.hasNonnullAnnotation( method ) &&
1276             !AnnotationsUtil.hasNullableAnnotation( method ) &&
1277             ElementsUtil.isWarningNotSuppressed( method,
1278                                                  Constants.WARNING_MISSING_RENDER_NULLABILITY,
1279                                                  Constants.SUPPRESS_REACT4J_WARNINGS_CLASSNAME ) )
1280        {
1281          final String message =
1282            MemberChecks.should( Constants.RENDER_CLASSNAME,
1283                                 "be annotated by a @Nonnull or a @Nullable annotation. " +
1284                                 MemberChecks.suppressedBy( Constants.WARNING_MISSING_RENDER_NULLABILITY,
1285                                                            Constants.SUPPRESS_REACT4J_WARNINGS_CLASSNAME ) );
1286          processingEnv.getMessager().printMessage( Diagnostic.Kind.WARNING, message, method );
1287        }
1288
1289        descriptor.setRender( method );
1290        foundRender = true;
1291      }
1292    }
1293    final boolean requireRender = descriptor.requireRender();
1294    if ( requireRender && !foundRender )
1295    {
1296      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.must( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
1297                                                       "contain a method annotated with the " +
1298                                                       MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.RENDER_CLASSNAME ) +
1299                                                       " annotation or must specify type=NO_RENDER" ),
1300                                    typeElement );
1301    }
1302    else if ( !requireRender )
1303    {
1304      if ( foundRender )
1305      {
1306        throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
1307                                                            "contain a method annotated with the " +
1308                                                            MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.RENDER_CLASSNAME ) +
1309                                                            " annotation or must not specify type=NO_RENDER" ),
1310                                      typeElement );
1311      }
1312      else if ( !descriptor.hasConstructor() &&
1313                !descriptor.hasPostConstruct() &&
1314                null == descriptor.getPostMount() &&
1315                null == descriptor.getPostRender() &&
1316                null == descriptor.getPreUpdate() &&
1317                null == descriptor.getPostUpdate() &&
1318                descriptor.getPreRenderDescriptors().isEmpty() &&
1319                descriptor.getPostRenderDescriptors().isEmpty() &&
1320                !descriptor.hasPreUpdateOnInputChange() &&
1321                !descriptor.hasPostUpdateOnInputChange() )
1322      {
1323        throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.must( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
1324                                                         "contain lifecycle methods if the the @View(type=NO_RENDER) parameter is specified" ),
1325                                      typeElement );
1326      }
1327    }
1328  }
1329
1330  private void determinePostMountMethod( @Nonnull final TypeElement typeElement,
1331                                         @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
1332                                         @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods )
1333  {
1334    for ( final ExecutableElement method : methods )
1335    {
1336      if ( AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( method, Constants.POST_MOUNT_CLASSNAME ) )
1337      {
1338        MemberChecks.mustBeLifecycleHook( typeElement,
1339                                          Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
1340                                          Constants.POST_MOUNT_CLASSNAME,
1341                                          method );
1342        descriptor.setPostMount( method );
1343      }
1344    }
1345  }
1346
1347  private void determinePostMountOrUpdateMethod( @Nonnull final TypeElement typeElement,
1348                                                 @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
1349                                                 @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods )
1350  {
1351    for ( final ExecutableElement method : methods )
1352    {
1353      if ( AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( method, Constants.POST_MOUNT_OR_UPDATE_CLASSNAME ) )
1354      {
1355        MemberChecks.mustBeLifecycleHook( typeElement,
1356                                          Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
1357                                          Constants.POST_MOUNT_OR_UPDATE_CLASSNAME,
1358                                          method );
1359        descriptor.setPostRender( method );
1360      }
1361    }
1362  }
1363
1364  private void determinePostUpdateMethod( @Nonnull final TypeElement typeElement,
1365                                          @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
1366                                          @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods )
1367  {
1368    for ( final ExecutableElement method : methods )
1369    {
1370      if ( AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( method, Constants.POST_UPDATE_CLASSNAME ) )
1371      {
1372        MemberChecks.mustBeLifecycleHook( typeElement,
1373                                          Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
1374                                          Constants.POST_UPDATE_CLASSNAME,
1375                                          method );
1376        descriptor.setPostUpdate( method );
1377      }
1378    }
1379  }
1380
1381  private void determinePreUpdateMethod( @Nonnull final TypeElement typeElement,
1382                                         @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
1383                                         @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods )
1384  {
1385    for ( final ExecutableElement method : methods )
1386    {
1387      if ( AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( method, Constants.PRE_UPDATE_CLASSNAME ) )
1388      {
1389        MemberChecks.mustBeLifecycleHook( typeElement,
1390                                          Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
1391                                          Constants.PRE_UPDATE_CLASSNAME,
1392                                          method );
1393        descriptor.setPreUpdate( method );
1394      }
1395    }
1396  }
1397
1398  private ExecutableType resolveMethodType( @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
1399                                            @Nonnull final ExecutableElement method )
1400  {
1401    return (ExecutableType) processingEnv.getTypeUtils().asMemberOf( descriptor.getDeclaredType(), method );
1402  }
1403
1404  @Nonnull
1405  private String deriveViewName( @Nonnull final TypeElement typeElement )
1406  {
1407    final String name =
1408      (String) AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValue( typeElement, Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME, "name" )
1409        .getValue();
1410
1411    if ( isSentinelName( name ) )
1412    {
1413      return typeElement.getSimpleName().toString();
1414    }
1415    else
1416    {
1417      if ( !SourceVersion.isIdentifier( name ) )
1418      {
1419        throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME ) +
1420                                      " target specified an invalid name '" + name + "'. The " +
1421                                      "name must be a valid java identifier.", typeElement );
1422      }
1423      else if ( SourceVersion.isKeyword( name ) )
1424      {
1425        throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME ) +
1426                                      " target specified an invalid name '" + name + "'. The " +
1427                                      "name must not be a java keyword.", typeElement );
1428      }
1429      return name;
1430    }
1431  }
1432
1433  private void determineViewCapabilities( @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
1434                                          @Nonnull final TypeElement typeElement )
1435  {
1436    if ( AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( typeElement, Constants.AREZ_COMPONENT_CLASSNAME ) )
1437    {
1438      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
1439                                                          "be annotated with the " +
1440                                                          MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.AREZ_COMPONENT_CLASSNAME ) +
1441                                                          " as React4j will add the annotation." ),
1442                                    typeElement );
1443    }
1444
1445    if ( descriptor.needsInjection() && !descriptor.getDeclaredType().getTypeArguments().isEmpty() )
1446    {
1447      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME ) +
1448                                    " target has enabled injection integration but the class " +
1449                                    "has type arguments which is incompatible with injection integration.",
1450                                    typeElement );
1451    }
1452  }
1453
1454  @Nonnull
1455  private ViewType extractViewType( @Nonnull final TypeElement typeElement )
1456  {
1457    final VariableElement declaredTypeEnum = (VariableElement)
1458      AnnotationsUtil
1459        .getAnnotationValue( typeElement, Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME, "type" )
1460        .getValue();
1461    return ViewType.valueOf( declaredTypeEnum.getSimpleName().toString() );
1462  }
1463
1464  private boolean isInputObservable( @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods,
1465                                     @Nonnull final ExecutableElement method,
1466                                     final boolean immutable )
1467  {
1468    final VariableElement parameter = (VariableElement)
1469      AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValue( method, Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME, "observable" ).getValue();
1470    return switch ( parameter.getSimpleName().toString() )
1471    {
1472      case "ENABLE" ->
1473      {
1474        if ( immutable )
1475        {
1476          throw new ProcessorException( "@Input target has specified both immutable=true and " +
1477                                        "observable=ENABLE which is an invalid combination.",
1478                                        method );
1479        }
1480        yield true;
1481      }
1482      case "DISABLE" -> false;
1483      default -> hasAnyArezObserverMethods( methods );
1484    };
1485  }
1486
1487  private boolean hasAnyArezObserverMethods( @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods )
1488  {
1489    return
1490      methods
1491        .stream()
1492        .anyMatch( m -> AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( m, Constants.MEMOIZE_CLASSNAME ) ||
1493                        ( AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( m, Constants.OBSERVE_CLASSNAME ) &&
1494                          ( !m.getParameters().isEmpty() || !m.getSimpleName().toString().equals( "trackRender" ) ) ) );
1495  }
1496
1497  private boolean isInputImmutable( @Nonnull final ExecutableElement method )
1498  {
1499    return (Boolean) AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValue( method, Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME, "immutable" )
1500      .getValue();
1501  }
1502
1503  private boolean isInputDependency( @Nonnull final ExecutableElement method,
1504                                     final boolean immutable,
1505                                     final boolean disposable )
1506  {
1507    final VariableElement parameter = (VariableElement)
1508      AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValue( method, Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME, "dependency" ).getValue();
1509    return switch ( parameter.getSimpleName().toString() )
1510    {
1511      case "ENABLE" ->
1512      {
1513        if ( !immutable )
1514        {
1515          throw new ProcessorException( "@Input target must be immutable if dependency=ENABLE is specified",
1516                                        method );
1517        }
1518        else if ( !disposable )
1519        {
1520          throw new ProcessorException( "@Input target must be disposable if dependency=ENABLE is specified",
1521                                        method );
1522        }
1523        yield true;
1524      }
1525      case "DISABLE" -> false;
1526      default -> immutable && disposable;
1527    };
1528  }
1529
1530  private boolean isInputDisposable( @Nonnull final ExecutableElement method, @Nonnull final Element inputType )
1531  {
1532    final VariableElement parameter = (VariableElement)
1533      AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValue( method, Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME, "disposable" ).getValue();
1534    return switch ( parameter.getSimpleName().toString() )
1535    {
1536      case "ENABLE" -> true;
1537      case "DISABLE" -> false;
1538      default -> (
1539                   ElementKind.CLASS == inputType.getKind() &&
1540                   AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( inputType, Constants.AREZ_COMPONENT_CLASSNAME )
1541                 ) ||
1542                 (
1543                   ( ElementKind.CLASS == inputType.getKind() || ElementKind.INTERFACE == inputType.getKind() ) &&
1544                   AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( inputType, Constants.ACT_AS_COMPONENT_CLASSNAME )
1545                 );
1546    };
1547  }
1548
1549  @Nonnull
1550  private ObserveOnRenderConfig resolveObserveOnRender( @Nonnull final ExecutableElement method,
1551                                                        @Nonnull final TypeMirror returnType,
1552                                                        @Nullable final Element inputType )
1553  {
1554    final VariableElement parameter = (VariableElement)
1555      AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValue( method, Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME, "observeOnRender" ).getValue();
1556    final String value = parameter.getSimpleName().toString();
1557    if ( "DISABLE".equals( value ) )
1558    {
1559      return new ObserveOnRenderConfig( false, false );
1560    }
1561
1562    final boolean assignableToComponentObservable = isAssignableToComponentObservable( returnType );
1563    final TypeElement typeElement = inputType instanceof TypeElement ? (TypeElement) inputType : null;
1564    final boolean isActAsComponentType = isActAsComponentType( inputType );
1565    final ArezComponentObservableResolution arezObservableResolution =
1566      null != typeElement ? resolveArezComponentObservable( typeElement ) : ArezComponentObservableResolution.NOT_AREZ_COMPONENT;
1567
1568    if ( "ENABLE".equals( value ) )
1569    {
1570      if ( ArezComponentObservableResolution.DISABLED == arezObservableResolution )
1571      {
1572        throw new ProcessorException( "@Input target has specified observeOnRender=ENABLE but the return type " +
1573                                      "is annotated with @ArezComponent and resolves observable=DISABLE.",
1574                                      method );
1575      }
1576      if ( assignableToComponentObservable )
1577      {
1578        return new ObserveOnRenderConfig( true, false );
1579      }
1580      if ( null == inputType || !canTypeUseRuntimeComponentObservableCheck( inputType ) )
1581      {
1582        throw new ProcessorException( "@Input target has specified observeOnRender=ENABLE but the return type " +
1583                                      "can never implement arez.component.ComponentObservable.",
1584                                      method );
1585      }
1586      if ( isFinalClass( inputType ) )
1587      {
1588        throw new ProcessorException( "@Input target has specified observeOnRender=ENABLE but the return type " +
1589                                      "is a final class that does not implement arez.component.ComponentObservable.",
1590                                      method );
1591      }
1592      return new ObserveOnRenderConfig( true, true );
1593    }
1594
1595    if ( assignableToComponentObservable )
1596    {
1597      return new ObserveOnRenderConfig( true, false );
1598    }
1599    if ( ArezComponentObservableResolution.ENABLED == arezObservableResolution )
1600    {
1601      return new ObserveOnRenderConfig( true, false );
1602    }
1603    if ( isActAsComponentType )
1604    {
1605      return new ObserveOnRenderConfig( true, true );
1606    }
1607    return new ObserveOnRenderConfig( false, false );
1608  }
1609
1610  private boolean canTypeUseRuntimeComponentObservableCheck( @Nonnull final Element inputType )
1611  {
1612    return ElementKind.CLASS == inputType.getKind() || ElementKind.INTERFACE == inputType.getKind();
1613  }
1614
1615  private boolean isFinalClass( @Nonnull final Element inputType )
1616  {
1617    return ElementKind.CLASS == inputType.getKind() && inputType.getModifiers().contains( Modifier.FINAL );
1618  }
1619
1620  private boolean isAssignableToComponentObservable( @Nonnull final TypeMirror type )
1621  {
1622    final TypeElement typeElement =
1623      processingEnv.getElementUtils().getTypeElement( Constants.COMPONENT_OBSERVABLE_CLASSNAME );
1624    return null != typeElement && processingEnv.getTypeUtils().isAssignable( type, typeElement.asType() );
1625  }
1626
1627  private boolean isActAsComponentType( @Nullable final Element inputType )
1628  {
1629    return null != inputType &&
1630           ( ElementKind.CLASS == inputType.getKind() || ElementKind.INTERFACE == inputType.getKind() ) &&
1631           AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( inputType, Constants.ACT_AS_COMPONENT_CLASSNAME );
1632  }
1633
1634  @Nonnull
1635  private ArezComponentObservableResolution resolveArezComponentObservable( @Nonnull final TypeElement element )
1636  {
1637    if ( !AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( element, Constants.AREZ_COMPONENT_CLASSNAME ) )
1638    {
1639      return ArezComponentObservableResolution.NOT_AREZ_COMPONENT;
1640    }
1641
1642    final VariableElement observableParameter = (VariableElement)
1643      AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValue( element, Constants.AREZ_COMPONENT_CLASSNAME, "observable" ).getValue();
1644    return switch ( observableParameter.getSimpleName().toString() )
1645    {
1646      case "ENABLE" -> ArezComponentObservableResolution.ENABLED;
1647      case "DISABLE" -> ArezComponentObservableResolution.DISABLED;
1648      default ->
1649      {
1650        final boolean disposeOnDeactivate = (Boolean)
1651          AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValue( element, Constants.AREZ_COMPONENT_CLASSNAME, "disposeOnDeactivate" )
1652            .getValue();
1653        yield disposeOnDeactivate ?
1654          ArezComponentObservableResolution.ENABLED :
1655          ArezComponentObservableResolution.DISABLED;
1656      }
1657    };
1658  }
1659
1660  private enum ArezComponentObservableResolution
1661  {
1662    ENABLED,
1663    DISABLED,
1664    NOT_AREZ_COMPONENT
1665  }
1666
1667  private boolean isContextInput( @Nonnull final ExecutableElement method )
1668  {
1669    final VariableElement parameter = (VariableElement)
1670      AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValue( method, Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME, "source" ).getValue();
1671    return "CONTEXT".equals( parameter.getSimpleName().toString() );
1672  }
1673
1674  private boolean shouldSetDefaultPriority( @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods )
1675  {
1676    return
1677      methods
1678        .stream()
1679        .filter( method -> !method.getModifiers().contains( Modifier.PRIVATE ) )
1680        .anyMatch( method -> AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( method, Constants.MEMOIZE_CLASSNAME ) ||
1681                             AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( method, Constants.OBSERVE_CLASSNAME ) );
1682  }
1683
1684  private void verifyNoDuplicateAnnotations( @Nonnull final ExecutableElement method )
1685    throws ProcessorException
1686  {
1687    final List<String> annotations =
1688      Arrays.asList( Constants.INPUT_DEFAULT_CLASSNAME,
1689                     Constants.INPUT_VALIDATE_CLASSNAME,
1690                     Constants.ON_INPUT_CHANGE_CLASSNAME,
1691                     Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME );
1692    MemberChecks.verifyNoOverlappingAnnotations( method, annotations, Collections.emptyMap() );
1693  }
1694
1695  private boolean isSentinelName( @Nonnull final String name )
1696  {
1697    return SENTINEL_NAME.equals( name );
1698  }
1699
1700  @Nonnull
1701  private String getPropertyAccessorName( @Nonnull final ExecutableElement method,
1702                                          @Nonnull final String specifiedName )
1703    throws ProcessorException
1704  {
1705    String name = deriveName( method, GETTER_PATTERN, specifiedName );
1706    if ( null != name )
1707    {
1708      return name;
1709    }
1710    else if ( method.getReturnType().getKind() == TypeKind.BOOLEAN )
1711    {
1712      name = deriveName( method, ISSER_PATTERN, specifiedName );
1713      if ( null != name )
1714      {
1715        return name;
1716      }
1717    }
1718    return method.getSimpleName().toString();
1719  }
1720
1721  @Nullable
1722  private String deriveName( @Nonnull final Element method, @Nonnull final Pattern pattern, @Nonnull final String name )
1723    throws ProcessorException
1724  {
1725    if ( isSentinelName( name ) )
1726    {
1727      final String methodName = method.getSimpleName().toString();
1728      final Matcher matcher = pattern.matcher( methodName );
1729      if ( matcher.find() )
1730      {
1731        final String candidate = matcher.group( 1 );
1732        return Character.toLowerCase( candidate.charAt( 0 ) ) + candidate.substring( 1 );
1733      }
1734      else
1735      {
1736        return null;
1737      }
1738    }
1739    else
1740    {
1741      return name;
1742    }
1743  }
1744}
